description_long: This is a dark brown, two-seater sofa with a sleek, contemporary design. The upholstery appears to be smooth leather or faux leather, featuring subtle tufted detailing on the backrest cushions that adds a touch of elegance. The sofa has two large, attached seat cushions and two backrest cushions, both uniform in size and shape. The armrests are rounded and padded, positioned at the same height as the backrest, providing a comfortable and inviting appearance. The legs are short, block-style, and slightly recessed, likely made of wood or a wood-like material. Overall, the sofa exudes a modern, urban vibe suitable for both indoor and semi-outdoor urban settings.
description: A dark brown, leather-upholstered two-seater sofa with tufted back cushions, rounded padded armrests, and short block legs. The design is sleek and modern, ideal for urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sofa's depth, thick armrest, and the profile of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the continuous, smooth backrest and the sofa's overall width.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, displaying the other armrest and cushion profile.
description_view_3: Front view showcasing the two tufted back cushions, seat cushions, and both rounded armrests.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, attached seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all uniform in size with subtle tufting on the back cushions.
attribute_armrest_style: Present, rounded and padded armrests at seat height, with a smooth, continuous profile and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, slightly recessed, with a wood-like appearance and no visible ornamentation.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with two attached, tufted cushions providing a uniform and supportive structure.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark brown color with a smooth, glossy leather finish and subtle tufted detailing on the backrest cushions.
